title: open /etc/containers/policy.json: no such file or directory

comments.body:
@flouthoc 
thanks for your help. 
I solve this problem.
But then I run this code,I got another errors:

`2022/06/07 15:03:07 error decoding response from copier subprocess: invalid character 'æ' looking for beginning of value`

what should I do?

@flouthoc 
`INFO[0003] [graphdriver] using prior storage driver: overlay 
2022/06/07 15:19:59 http: panic serving 192.168.0.254:59141: error decoding response from copier subprocess: invalid character 'æ' looking for beginning of value
goroutine 22 [running]:
net/http.(*conn).serve.func1()
        /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:1802 +0xb9
panic({0xfd0a20, 0xc0001100c0})
        /usr/local/go/src/runtime/panic.go:1047 +0x266
s2i-deploy/pkg/runtime/buildah.BuildImages()
        /home/project/paas/s2i-deploy/paas-s2i-deploy/pkg/runtime/buildah/buildah.go:47 +0x725
s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller/ocifile.(*OciBinaryFile).Server(0xf62f20, {0x7fe2f0bcfa68, 0xc0004a0005}, 0xb)
        /home/project/paas/s2i-deploy/paas-s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller/ocifile/binary.go:13 +0x29
s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller.(*Controller).ServeHTTP(0x0, {0x125adc0, 0xc0002c8000}, 0xc0002be000)
        /home/project/paas/s2i-deploy/paas-s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller/controller.go:27 +0x6b
net/http.serverHandler.ServeHTTP({0xc00057a0c0}, {0x125adc0, 0xc0002c8000}, 0xc0002be000)
        /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:2879 +0x43b
net/http.(*conn).serve(0xc000300000, {0x1268360, 0xc0003e3140})
        /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:1930 +0xb08
created by net/http.(*Server).Serve
        /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:3034 +0x4e8`

> @Alanthur Since I can't see the stack trace could you check with break points after which call this fails cause I cannot see the complete stack trace so its hard to tell from this side but it seems issue is with your business logic now.
> 
> To confirm if something is not wrong with your setup try running a simpler example and see if this works and then try debugging your custom implementation.
> 
> ```go
> package main
> 
> import (
>   "context"
>   "fmt"
> 
>   "github.com/containers/buildah"
>   is "github.com/containers/image/v5/storage"
>   "github.com/containers/storage"
>   "github.com/containers/storage/pkg/unshare"
> )
> 
> func main() {
>   if buildah.InitReexec() {
>     return
>   }
>   unshare.MaybeReexecUsingUserNamespace(false)
> 
>   buildStoreOptions, err := storage.DefaultStoreOptions(unshare.IsRootless(), unshare.GetRootlessUID())
>   if err != nil {
>     panic(err)
>   }
> 
>   buildStore, err := storage.GetStore(buildStoreOptions)
>   if err != nil {
>     panic(err)
>   }
>   defer buildStore.Shutdown(false)
> 
>   builderOpts := buildah.BuilderOptions{
>     FromImage:        "docker.io/library/alpine:latest",
>   }
> 
>   builder, err := buildah.NewBuilder(context.TODO(), buildStore, builderOpts)
>   if err != nil {
>     panic(err)
>   }
>   defer builder.Delete()
>   // Note!!!! please change this to actual path on your host
>   err = builder.Add("/home/some/", false, buildah.AddAndCopyOptions{}, "test")
>   if err != nil {
>     panic(err)
>   }
> 
>   imageRef, err := is.Transport.ParseStoreReference(buildStore, "docker.io/myusername/my-image")
>   if err != nil {
>     panic(err)
>   }
> 
>   imageId, _, _, err := builder.Commit(context.TODO(), imageRef, buildah.CommitOptions{})
>   if err != nil {
>     panic(err)
>   }
> 
>   fmt.Printf("Image built! %s\n", imageId)
> }
> ```

if I run this code ,I got some errors:

`INFO[0001] [graphdriver] using prior storage driver: overlay 
2022/06/07 15:23:44 http: panic serving 192.168.0.254:59175: error checking on destination /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/780218b39779e3bf79a21b4169e381d50a077a258c739d9b008fb096011f44d1/merged/home/some: error decoding response from copier subprocess: invalid character 'æ' looking for beginning of value
goroutine 11 [running]:
net/http.(*conn).serve.func1()
        /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:1802 +0xb9
panic({0xfd0a20, 0xc00014c078})
        /usr/local/go/src/runtime/panic.go:1047 +0x266
s2i-deploy/pkg/runtime/buildah.BuildImages()
        /home/project/paas/s2i-deploy/paas-s2i-deploy/pkg/runtime/buildah/buildah.go:42 +0x445
s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller/ocifile.(*OciBinaryFile).Server(0xf62f20, {0x0, 0xc000149ea5}, 0xb)

s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller.(*Controller).ServeHTTP(0x0, {0x125ad40, 0xc00054e380}, 0xc0005bc800)
        /home/project/paas/s2i-deploy/paas-s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller/controller.go:27 +0x6b
net/http.serverHandler.ServeHTTP({0xc0001ef740}, {0x125ad40, 0xc00054e380}, 0xc0005bc800)
        /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:2879 +0x43b
net/http.(*conn).serve(0xc0001ac5a0, {0x12682e0, 0xc0001ef5f0})
        /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:1930 +0xb08
created by net/http.(*Server).Serve
        /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:3034 +0x4e8`

> > @Alanthur Since I can't see the stack trace could you check with break points after which call this fails cause I cannot see the complete stack trace so its hard to tell from this side but it seems issue is with your business logic now.
> > To confirm if something is not wrong with your setup try running a simpler example and see if this works and then try debugging your custom implementation.
> > ```go
> > package main
> > 
> > import (
> >   "context"
> >   "fmt"
> > 
> >   "github.com/containers/buildah"
> >   is "github.com/containers/image/v5/storage"
> >   "github.com/containers/storage"
> >   "github.com/containers/storage/pkg/unshare"
> > )
> > 
> > func main() {
> >   if buildah.InitReexec() {
> >     return
> >   }
> >   unshare.MaybeReexecUsingUserNamespace(false)
> > 
> >   buildStoreOptions, err := storage.DefaultStoreOptions(unshare.IsRootless(), unshare.GetRootlessUID())
> >   if err != nil {
> >     panic(err)
> >   }
> > 
> >   buildStore, err := storage.GetStore(buildStoreOptions)
> >   if err != nil {
> >     panic(err)
> >   }
> >   defer buildStore.Shutdown(false)
> > 
> >   builderOpts := buildah.BuilderOptions{
> >     FromImage:        "docker.io/library/alpine:latest",
> >   }
> > 
> >   builder, err := buildah.NewBuilder(context.TODO(), buildStore, builderOpts)
> >   if err != nil {
> >     panic(err)
> >   }
> >   defer builder.Delete()
> >   // Note!!!! please change this to actual path on your host
> >   err = builder.Add("/home/some/", false, buildah.AddAndCopyOptions{}, "test")
> >   if err != nil {
> >     panic(err)
> >   }
> > 
> >   imageRef, err := is.Transport.ParseStoreReference(buildStore, "docker.io/myusername/my-image")
> >   if err != nil {
> >     panic(err)
> >   }
> > 
> >   imageId, _, _, err := builder.Commit(context.TODO(), imageRef, buildah.CommitOptions{})
> >   if err != nil {
> >     panic(err)
> >   }
> > 
> >   fmt.Printf("Image built! %s\n", imageId)
> > }
> > ```
> 
> if I run this code ,I got some errors:
> 
> `INFO[0001] [graphdriver] using prior storage driver: overlay 2022/06/07 15:23:44 http: panic serving 192.168.0.254:59175: error checking on destination /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/780218b39779e3bf79a21b4169e381d50a077a258c739d9b008fb096011f44d1/merged/home/some: error decoding response from copier subprocess: invalid character 'æ' looking for beginning of value goroutine 11 [running]: net/http.(*conn).serve.func1() /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:1802 +0xb9 panic({0xfd0a20, 0xc00014c078}) /usr/local/go/src/runtime/panic.go:1047 +0x266 s2i-deploy/pkg/runtime/buildah.BuildImages() /home/project/paas/s2i-deploy/paas-s2i-deploy/pkg/runtime/buildah/buildah.go:42 +0x445 s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller/ocifile.(*OciBinaryFile).Server(0xf62f20, {0x0, 0xc000149ea5}, 0xb) /home/project/paas/s2i-deploy/paas-s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller/ocifile/binary.go:13 +0x29 s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller.(*Controller).ServeHTTP(0x0, {0x125ad40, 0xc00054e380}, 0xc0005bc800) /home/project/paas/s2i-deploy/paas-s2i-deploy/pkg/web/controller/controller.go:27 +0x6b net/http.serverHandler.ServeHTTP({0xc0001ef740}, {0x125ad40, 0xc00054e380}, 0xc0005bc800) /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:2879 +0x43b net/http.(*conn).serve(0xc0001ac5a0, {0x12682e0, 0xc0001ef5f0}) /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:1930 +0xb08 created by net/http.(*Server).Serve /usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:3034 +0x4e8`

@Alanthur Does it works if you comment the `builder.Add` call ? Could you add break points or dummy `fmt.Printf(` calls to check on which this is failing ?

@flouthoc 
It is not work on the `builder.Add` call. And `builder.Run` also not work.

@flouthoc 
thanks for your help. I move this code in Main.Then it works.
